name: Dulux® Diamond™ Exterior Latex Paint
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior latex engineered for the Canadian climate. Diamond Exterior provides excellent protection against UV fade, moisture, chalking, and cracking — including performance through Ontario freeze-thaw cycles and coastal exposure. Self-priming on previously painted surfaces in good condition.
features: Premium 100% acrylic — exceptional durability outdoors
Excellent UV resistance — colour retains vibrancy longer
Resists cracking and peeling through freeze-thaw cycles
Self-priming on previously painted surfaces in good condition
Breathable film — reduces blistering
Rain resistant within 1 hour of application

name: Dulux® WeatherGuard® Exterior 100% Acrylic Latex Paint
description: Professional-grade 100% acrylic exterior latex formulated for demanding Canadian weather. WeatherGuard delivers superior dirt resistance, flexibility in cold temperatures, and long-lasting protection — the contractor's choice for commercial and residential exteriors.
features: Superior dirt-pick-up resistance
Flexible at low temperatures — resists cracking
Rain resistant in 1 hour
Good adhesion to a wide range of exterior surfaces
Mould and mildew resistant
Long-lasting protection — extended repaint cycle

name: Dulux® WeatherGuard® Exterior 100% Acrylic Primer
description: 100% acrylic exterior primer engineered to penetrate and seal weathered, porous, and bare wood substrates before WeatherGuard or Diamond Exterior topcoats. Provides a uniform, stable base to maximise topcoat adhesion and performance.
features: Penetrates and seals bare and weathered wood
Blocks tannin staining on cedar and redwood
Promotes adhesion on chalky, porous surfaces
Compatible with all Dulux exterior topcoats
Rain resistant in 1 hour

name: Dulux® Professional Wood Finishes Exterior CWF-UV5® Penetrating Wood Finish
description: The industry-standard penetrating oil-based wood finish that deeply nourishes wood fibres with linseed oil while UV inhibitors protect against greying and degradation. CWF-UV5 allows wood to breathe naturally and won't crack or peel — the preferred choice for log homes, decks, and rough-sawn timber.
features: Penetrating oil formula — nourishes wood from within
UV inhibitors prevent greying and fibre degradation
Won't crack, peel, or blister
Maintains natural wood appearance and breathability
Resists mould, mildew, and rot when properly maintained
Ideal for rough-sawn, weathered, and log surfaces

name: Dulux® Professional Wood Finishes Exterior Solid Color 100% Acrylic Stain
shortName: Pro Wood Finishes Solid Acrylic Stain
description: Premium 100% acrylic solid colour stain for exterior wood surfaces. Provides full hide like a paint but with a flat, natural appearance that doesn't crack or peel when applied to properly prepared wood substrates.
features: Full colour hide like a paint on rough-sawn wood
100% acrylic — excellent UV and weather resistance
Flexible film — resists cracking on wood movement
Mould and mildew resistant
Excellent colour retention outdoors

name: Dulux® Professional Wood Finishes Exterior Semi-Transparent Acrylic-Oil Stain
description: A premium acrylic-oil blend semi-transparent stain combining the deep penetration of oil with the colour durability of acrylic. Enhances natural wood grain while providing superior UV and moisture protection — preferred for premium deck and siding projects.
features: Acrylic-oil blend — best of both technologies
Deep penetration — won't crack, peel, or blister
Enhances and shows natural wood grain
Superior UV protection vs. oil-only products
Good mould and mildew resistance

name: Dulux® Professional Wood Finishes Exterior Semi-Transparent Oil Finish
description: Traditional oil-based semi-transparent exterior finish for decks, siding, and timber. Deep oil penetration nourishes wood fibres for maximum durability and a rich, natural look.
features: Traditional oil penetrating formula
Deeply nourishes wood — long-lasting protection
Natural enhancement of wood grain
Good water repellency

name: Dulux® Professional Wood Finishes Exterior Ready-Mixed Semi-Transparent Oil Finish Sealer
shortName: Pro Wood Finishes Ready-Mix Oil Sealer
description: Ready-mixed (no tinting required) semi-transparent oil finish sealer in popular natural tones. A convenient option for contractors who need a reliable exterior wood finish without colour-matching delays.
bases: Ready Mixed — select colour at point of sale
features: Ready-mixed — no tinting delays on job site
Available in popular natural exterior wood tones
Same penetrating oil protection as tinted line
Convenient for contractors

name: Dulux® Woodpride® Exterior Semi-Transparent Oil-Acrylic Stain
description: Consumer-grade semi-transparent oil-acrylic stain for residential decks, fences, and siding. Woodpride combines good penetration with easy consumer application, providing colour enhancement and weather protection for smooth and semi-smooth wood.
features: Consumer-friendly application
Enhances natural wood grain
Won't peel or crack
Weather and UV protection
Wide range of popular exterior tones

name: Dulux® Woodpride® Exterior Solid Color 100% Acrylic Stain
description: 100% acrylic solid colour stain for residential exterior wood surfaces. Full opacity hides the natural wood colour while the flat finish provides a classic painted appearance that complements Canadian residential architecture.
features: Full opacity solid colour
100% acrylic — excellent exterior durability
Flexible film resists cracking with wood movement
Good UV colour retention
Mould and mildew resistant

name: Dulux® Woodpride® Exterior Solid Color Oil-Acrylic Stain
description: Solid colour oil-acrylic blend stain combining the penetration and colour depth of oil with the topcoat durability of acrylic. Preferred where enhanced adhesion on weathered or chalky surfaces is required before a solid colour finish.
features: Oil penetration improves adhesion on weathered surfaces
Full solid colour hide
Good flexibility and crack resistance
Better adhesion vs. pure acrylic on chalky surfaces

name: Dulux® X-Pert® Interior/Exterior Waterborne Alkyd Primer Sealer
description: Waterborne alkyd primer-sealer providing oil-like adhesion and stain blocking with water cleanup. Excellent for problem surfaces including previously oil-painted surfaces, glossy surfaces, and substrates with tannin or bleed concerns.
features: Waterborne alkyd — oil adhesion with water cleanup
Blocks stains and tannin bleed
Bonds to oil-painted and glossy surfaces without sanding
Suitable for interior and exterior use
Bridges over minor surface imperfections
